start.speaker: Plaque
start.text: The runes whisper: A, then C, then B.

start.speaker: Plaque
start.text: The runes whisper: B, then A, then C.

confirm.speaker: Mentor
confirm.text: Find the archive journal, then take the exit.

solo_path.speaker: Mentor
solo_path.text: Then move fast and keep your notes close.

start.speaker: Mentor
start.text: The archive door is sealed. Will you help stabilize the system?

confirm.speaker: Mentor
confirm.text: Touch the central terminal first. The exit unlocks when your plan completes.

shutdown_path.speaker: Mentor
shutdown_path.text: Pull the breaker once the terminal handshake is logged.

stabilize_path.speaker: Mentor
stabilize_path.text: Tune each relay in order: A, then B, then C.

start.speaker: Mentor
start.text: The signal is looping. Choose your approach before the chamber locks down.

display_name: Episode 02: Signal in the Dust Entry Trigger
Episode 02: Signal in the Dust Exit Door
Episode 02: Signal in the Dust Controller

help.speaker: Mentor
help.text: Use the plaque if you need a reminder. The sequence starts at sigil A.

silent.speaker: Mentor
silent.text: Then trust your memory. No second voice from me.

start.speaker: Mentor
start.text: Three sigils. One order. Speak now if you want guidance.

confirm.speaker: Mentor
confirm.text: Clear the arena, collect the cache, then extract.

hard.speaker: Mentor
hard.text: Challenge route locked in. Two sentries will engage together.

safe.speaker: Mentor
safe.text: Safe route acknowledged. One sentry is active. Keep your guard up.

start.speaker: Mentor
start.text: Two sentry emplacements watch the causeway. Pick your route.

confirm.speaker: Mentor
confirm.text: Morning for trade, night for truth. Move when the clock allows it.

direct_path.speaker: Mentor
direct_path.text: Skip the chatter. Catch the vendor while the stall is open, then meet me at the tavern after dark.

rumors_path.speaker: Mentor
rumors_path.text: Then read the notice board before you see the vendor. It changes what you find later.

start.speaker: Mentor
start.text: Hollowmere runs on schedules. Want rumor chatter or the direct route?
